T3P. ^Flf, 3TR ^t%5 f?H3jTJT :-T^TtWT, ^RcT^ WT3T, WT 1 1 , ^ 3 , ^ ^ 5 (i) 3^T. ^?.ft.3TT. 324, cflfRS 14 " P * ^ , 1956 SHI y^lP/ld fatj TTTT $ SIR d c ^ ^ - 3 ^ ' -ST.^Lft. 370(31), cTCHS 8 ^R^rf, 1997, ^T.^T.Ff. 547(3?), CTRR3 31 3PTOT, 1998, ^T.^T.^T. 17(3?), cTRfe 5 ^fWt, 2000, ^TT.^T.Fi. 262(31), clRRS 23 ^ellt 2000, ^TT.^l.Ff. 172(31), mfel 12 "RT^, 2001 3?k^TT.^l.Ff. 330(3?), cflfRS9 ^ , 2001, ^t^l.Ff. 460(3?), c1RR3 25 ^T, 2001, ^ R f t . 464( 3?), TTTCP3 9 ^T, 2003 3TR ^.^l.ft. 296(31), clKfe 19 "% 2006 SRT ^f#f^T t%ri TTTT | 2598 GI/2006 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)j M1MSTRY OF LAW AND JUSTICE (Department of Legal Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th August, 2006 G.S.R. 501(E)-—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 15 of the Notaries Act, 1952 (53 of 1952), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Notaries Rules, 1956, namely :— 1.(1) These rules may be called the Notaries (Second Amendment) Rules, 2006. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Notaries Rules, 1956, in the Schedule, in column (I), against serial number 25 relating to Xioa" , in column (3), for the figure "50", the figure "75" shall be substituted. [F.No.5(27I)/200l-NC] R. M. SHARMA. Addl. Secy. Note :—The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Part II, Section 3. Sub-section (i) vide number S.R.O. 324, dated the 14th February, 1956 and subsequently amended by G.S.R. 370(E), dated the 8th July, 1997, G.S.R. 547(E), dated the 31st August, 1998, G.S.R. 17(E), dated the 5th January, 2000, G.S.R. 262(E), dated the 28th March, 2000, G.S.R. 630(E), dated the 21 st July, 2000, G.S.R. 172(E), dated the 12th March, 2001 and G.S.R. 330(E), dated the 9th May, 2001, G.S.R. 460(E), dated the 25th June, 2001, G.S.R. 464(E), dated the 9th June, 2003 and G.S.R. 296(E), dated the 19th May, 2006.
